question: Develop a `ResourceLogger` class that dynamically allocates a C-style string in its constructor to store a log message. Implement a destructor that deallocates this memory and prints a message indicating the resource is freed. Demonstrate its usage by creating an object and letting it go out of scope.

test_cases.expected:
Entering main scope...
ResourceLogger created with message: Hello, this is a valid log message.
ResourceLogger created with message: This message will be freed when exiting its scope.
Inside nested scope.
Resource freed: This message will be freed when exiting its scope.
ResourceLogger created with an empty message (nullptr input handled).
Exiting main scope...
Resource freed: 
Resource freed: Hello, this is a valid log message.
